Examples of Flask applications using Celery, JavaScript, and a tutorial with setup and configuration details.

## Folders
- **[celery](celery/README.md)**: HTML template for task execution, Flask app initialization, Celery tasks, route definitions, Celery app initialization, configuration, usage instructions, and dependencies for a Flask Celery example.
- **[javascript](javascript/README.md)**: HTML templates, Flask app initialization, tests, version control, license, project config, and README.
- **[tutorial](tutorial/README.md)**: CSS styles, HTML templates, Flask app setup, authentication, blog management, SQLite functions, tests, Git ignore rules, BSD-3-Clause license, configuration, and instructions for the Flask tutorial.
